methods.name: odoo.addons.despatch_advice_import.wizard.despatch_advice_import.DespatchAdviceImport.parse_despatch_advice
documentation: # (specified into the Order document -> po's name)
'company': {'vat': 'FR12123456789'}, # Only used to check we are not
'backorder_qty: None  # if provided and qty != expected
# the backorder qty will be delivered
